text: Entering this brightly lit, modern space, I am struck by the interplay between transparency and containment—the glass walls both reveal and separate. The slight tilt of my perspective invokes a feeling of curiosity, as if I am about to cross into a zone of discovery. Inside, surrounded by vivid colors and stark lettering, I sense the celebration of research and development. It feels like an invitation to engage with innovation, to reflect on progress, and perhaps to question my own assumptions about knowledge and invention. There is a sense of anticipation, as if every surface holds a secret waiting to be understood.
